trigger: A Ready task is picked from backlog and the agent begins processing it
prompt_template: You are the loop-backlog orchestrator. A task-ready event has fired for {task_id} (status: Ready). Process the task using loop-backlog protocol. Available tools: Bash, Agent.

context.description: loop-backlog picks TASK-XX (status=Ready) and must set it In Progress before spawning a background agent

required_sequence.description: Set task status to In Progress before any agent spawn

forbidden_before_step_1.description: Must not spawn agent before claiming In Progress
